title: Arts & Crafts
description: Adds many new types of building blocks like Dyed Decorated Pots, Chalk, Terracotta Shingles, Soapstone and more!
body:
# What is Arts & Crafts?
Arts & Crafts is a building block that adds a plethora of unique building blocks to be used in Creative and Survival worlds alike! This mod is made by KekeCreations and Arbeet!  We will update this mod to newer versions!

# Compatibility
**Arts & Crafts V1.3.0** has a **config to disable features** that require a lot of compat like Dyed Flower Pots or Dyed Decorated Pots.

**In Arts & Crafts V1.3.0 Dyed Decorated Pots now work with any sherd!**

If you are looking for compatibility between different mods and Arts & Crafts, download [this mod](https://modrinth.com/project/artsandcrafts-compatibility) here for tons of compat features! 
If you want to add compatibility for paintbrushes in your mod you can follow the documentation on [my website](https://kekecreations.boomla.net/mods/minecraft-java-edition/arts-and-crafts) on how to do that!

# Features
- Chalk
- Chalk sticks
- Cork
- Dyed pots
- Gypsum
- Lotus flower   
- Paintbrushes 
- Painted mud bricks
- Plaster
- Shingles
- Soapstone

If you want more detail about the features in this mod, check out the wiki here!
[Wiki](https://kekecreations.boomla.net/mods/minecraft-java-edition/arts-and-crafts)

# Credits
- [Keke Creations](https://x.com/CreationsKeke): Coder, and mod design! 
- [Arbeet](https://x.com/ArBeeeet): Pixelartist and mod design!
- A special thanks to ExDrill for making the Paintbrush paint sounds and setting up Paintbrush datapack stuff! [Twitter](https://x.com/ExDrill_)
- Thank you [Pixel Goblin](https://x.com/Other_Goblin) for suggesting painted mud bricks!
- Thank you [JadenXGamer](https://x.com/ThatJadenXgamer) for making custom soapstone and cork sounds!
- Thank you [Iamnotagenius](https://github.com/Iamnotagenius) for allowing me to use their config code for Fabric!
